domain_name: Voice-based community media platforms in rural India

background_concepts.concept: Interactive Voice Response (IVR) and DTMF signaling
background_concepts.why_needed: Nearly every reading here describes voice forums built on IVR, keypad (DTMF) navigation, and text-to-speech, but assumes the reader already understands how an automated telephony menu system captures and routes caller input.

suggested_resources.title: What Is IVR? - Interactive Voice Response Explained (AWS)
What Is Interactive Voice Response (IVR)? (IBM Think)

background_concepts.concept: Community radio licensing and regulation in India (GOPA, CRS policy)
background_concepts.why_needed: These readings discuss running community radio stations in India within a specific institutional and legal framework (non-profit eligibility, content quotas, advertising limits, the Grant of Permission Agreement) that they reference without explaining.

suggested_resources.title: Policy Guidelines for Setting up Community Radio Stations in India (MIB / Broadcast Seva)
How to Start a Community Radio Station (CRS): Step by Step Guide

domain_name: Computational detection and analysis of media bias and political polarization

background_concepts.why_needed: Blogosphere and Twitter polarization studies quantify partisan clustering using graph-theoretic measures like modularity and assortative mixing, which are used as the analytic backbone but not derived or explained in the papers.

suggested_resources.title: Network Analysis and Modeling, CSCI 5352 Lecture 5 (Aaron Clauset, assortativity & modularity)
Social Network Analysis: Homophily (Donglei Du lecture notes)

domain_name: Community networks and grassroots connectivity infrastructure

background_concepts.why_needed: The community-currency-powered network reading proposes local currencies as a sustainability model without explaining what a complementary/community currency is or how mutual-credit and local exchange systems function.

suggested_resources.title: What complementary currencies look like (Mediterranean Co-Production Lab lesson)

background_concepts.concept: Wireless mesh networks and last-mile backhaul
background_concepts.why_needed: Grassroots connectivity readings assume familiarity with how community networks are physically built—mesh nodes, gateways, backhaul, and multi-hop routing—which underpins the sustainability and maintenance discussions but is not taught.

suggested_resources.title: Over The Air: Community Wireless and Mesh Networking Primer (Tech Learning Collective)

domain_name: WhatsApp and social media adoption in the Global South

background_concepts.why_needed: The mobile media actor-network reading frames adoption through actor-network theory, treating human and non-human actors symmetrically, but assumes the reader knows this sociological framework rather than introducing it.

suggested_resources.title: The social meaning of ICTs / media theory context — Journalism University explainer on the public sphere and networked media

domain_name: Gendered access to mobile phones and voice interfaces
AI-assisted content moderation and monitoring for climate/environmental discourse

background_concepts.why_needed: The environmental conservation media monitoring work centers on few-shot learning to classify content in low-resource languages, assuming the reader understands N-way-K-shot setups and why limited labeled data motivates this approach.

domain_name: Media and information access for displaced and disabled populations
